reason: Attach source-backed abstract span for the Ellenberg-Gijswijt cap-set result; leaves the numeric constant as methodology context rather than new accepted evidence.

payload.text: arXiv:1605.09223 states that the Croot-Lev-Pach method bounds progression-free subsets of F_q^n by c^n with c < q; for q = 3 this is the cap-set problem.
